title: Fluffy Citrusy Italian Lemon Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and fluffy sick-day Italian dish featuring a mix of spices and demerara sugar for added sweetness without the use of regular sugar, perfect for soothing the soul.

ingredients.name: 3 medium bell peppers, diced (red, yellow, green, orange)

instructions: Wash and finely chop the lemon. Mince the garlic cloves.
In a small bowl, combine the lemon juice, demerara sugar, minced garlic, cumin seed, smoked paprika, ground ginger, and olive oil. Mix well until the sugar is dissolved.
Add the bell peppers to the mixing bowl with the spice mixture. Toss gently to ensure all vegetables are coated evenly.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Once hot, pour in the mixed vegetable-lemon sauce from the bowl.
Stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until bell peppers become tender but still slightly crisp, tossing occasionally to prevent sticking.
Remove from heat and serve immediately as a sweet and tangy side dish to accompany any meal.
